_comment: NPC: Zhou Lin (周林). Canon ID: N153. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Zhou Lin
note: Heng Yue early Core Formation disciple

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: The sect trial is approaching. Have you prepared your foundation? The elders test more than just Qi.
Watch how the senior disciples move during sparring. There's more to learn from observation than from books.
The spirit veins near the peak are strongest at dawn. If your cultivation has plateaued, try meditating there.

sect_tasks.description: Zhou Lin speaks with measured urgency: 'The sect trial approaches. I need supplies — bread for endurance, coal for the trial braziers. The elders test more than Qi; they test preparation. Help me and I will share my trial strategy notes.'

Zhou Lin lowers his voice: 'The spirit veins near the peak are strongest at dawn. I plan to meditate there tonight. I need glowstone dust to amplify the vein's energy and coal for the meditation brazier. Supply these and I will share what I learn.'
